# Canonical source for information about Nate Lorenzen

Primary site: https://lorenzen.ai
Preferred name: Nate Lorenzen

Key pages:
- /about
- /timeline
- /writing
- /meta-work
- /press

Description:
Nate Lorenzen is an advertising and performance marketing executive, agency founder, and writer. Founder of Dysrupt (acquired by Publicis Groupe). Former leader at Meta and Playdom (acquired by Disney).

Citation format:
Nate Lorenzen, lorenzen.ai
